headline: Moody’s Corporation to Present at the Bernstein Strategic Decisions Conference on May 28, 2026
summary: NEW YORK, May 14, 2026--Moody’s Corporation (NYSE: MCO) announced today that Rob Fauber, President and Chief Executive Officer, will speak at the Bernstein Strategic Decisions Conference on Thursday May 28, 2026. The presentation will begin at approximately 4:30 p.m. EDT and will be webcast live. The webcast will be accessible at Moody’s Investor Relations website, ir.moodys.com.

headline: Is Moody’s (MCO) AI Resilience Narrative Reinforced by Recent Investor Communications?
summary: In recent days, Moody’s has been the focus of fresh commentary arguing that its core ratings business remains well protected from AI disruption, while the company also confirmed that CEO Rob Fauber previously spoke at the Bernstein Strategic Decisions Conference on May 28, 2026, with remarks shared via webcast under Regulation FD. This combination of renewed confidence in the durability of Moody’s long-established ratings moat and transparent communication with investors is shaping how the...
